channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: I searched Amazon’s entire Mother’s Day sale — these are the 12 deals worth buying from Ninja, Dyson, KitchenAid, and other brands
item.description: I've looked through the retailer's entire Mother's Day sale to find deals from Dyson, Kitchenaid, and other leading brands.

item.title: Native Instruments Komplete 26 adds weird new synths and experimental piano sounds
item.description: The latest version of Native Instruments' Komplete music production bundle is here with 62 new additions, including the wonderfully weird Absynth 6. Komplete 26 comes in several flavors, starting with three $99 Select bundles: Beats, Band, and Electronic. Prices jump pretty steeply from there, with Standard costing $549, Ultimate costing $1,249, and the Collector's Edition […]...

item.title: What could go wrong? A fully electronic braking system is being built into a car for the first time
item.description: A fully electronic braking system is being built into a car for the first time — are we sure removing hydraulic brakes is a good idea?

item.title: Experts warn Microsoft Phone Link tool exploited by 'unknown threat' to steal SMS and OTP info
item.description: A known RAT was given new capabilities in order to exfiltrate 2FA codes and more.

item.title: Plus fort que les heures creuses ? La nouvelle méthode d’EDF testée grâce au compteur Linky
item.description: EDF lance une expérimentation grandeur nature. 6 600 foyers tirés au sort vont tester de nouvelles grilles tarifaires variables, dans le but de mesurer leur capacité à adapter leur consommation au prix de l'électricité.

item.title: The best beauty tech you can still grab in time for Mother’s Day
item.description: If you’re looking to indulge mom this Mother’s Day, a gift that makes her feel a little more taken care of is a good place to start. Fortunately, if you’re looking for something to make her feel pampered, we know a thing or two about beauty tech, which can deliver on that front. Some of […]

item.title: Apple AirPods Pro 3, MacBook Pro 14 M5 et Xgimi Elfin Flip Plus : les promos incontournables du jour
item.description: Ce mercredi 6 mai 2026 s’annonce riche en bonnes affaires tech.

item.title: Market research is too slow for the AI era, so Brox built 60,000 identical 'digital twins' of real people you can survey instantly, repeatedly
item.description: In a world where a viral TikTok video can cause a brand to trend globally in mere hours, the traditional market research cycle — often spanning 12 weeks — is becoming a liability. The lag between a survey question and the answers from a wide (or targeted) pool of respondents has become a primary bottleneck for Fortune 500 decision-makers who are forced to navigate volatile geopolitical and economic shifts with data that is frequently outdated by the time it reaches a slide deck, as industry experts have observed. Brox, a predictive human intelligence startup, recently announced a strategic fun...

item.title: L’homologation du Tesla FSD en Europe s’annonce plus complexe que prévu, révèlent des échanges internes
item.description: Après un feu vert néerlandais obtenu en avril, Tesla avance ses pions pour faire approuver son logiciel de conduite supervisée FSD dans toute l'Europe. Mais entre les réserves de plusieurs régulateurs nordiques et les questions légitimes sur la sécurité, le chemin reste encore semé d'embûches avec, parfois, un pas en avant pour deux pas en arrière. ...

item.title: L’iPhone 18 Pro aurait le droit à un écran LTPO+ : c’est quoi ?
item.description: Les rumeurs se précisent autour de l'iPhone 18 Pro d'Apple. Il proposerait pour la première fois un écran Oled LTPO+ fabriqué par Samsung et LG.

item.title: Freshworks and Coinbase announce more than 1 in 10 jobs to go as companies replace workforce with AI technologies — tech company layoffs near 100K in 2026 alone
item.description: Freshworks and Coinbase are joining the list of companies laying off employees due to AI in 2026

item.title: Meilleure souris gamer pas chère : notre sélection 2026 à moins de 50 €
item.description: La souris gaming est l'accessoire indispensable de tous les joueurs PC, qu'ils soient sur une machine fixe ou un PC portable gaming. Mais les prix grimpent vite... bienvenue sur notre sélection maison des meilleures souris gamer pas chères.

item.title: Amazon teases its Prime Day sale in June with early device deals — Echo, Ring, and Kindle from $14.99
item.description: Amazon has confirmed Prime Day will take place in June this year, and it's giving us a preview of the summer sale with incredible device deals that you can shop right now.

item.title: This slim ice cream maker could fit in my already crowded kitchen
item.description: For the past few months, I've defiantly walked past the Ninja Creami at Costco as I think about our air fryer, toaster oven, breadmaker, rice cooker, and stand mixer already vying for limited counter space. Nutribullet's new Chill ice cream maker could finally break my resolve with its smaller footprint. While the Creami's base measures […]

item.title: Facebook et Instagram ont une nouvelle solution pour identifier les plus jeunes
item.description: Régulièrement accusée de ne pas assez protéger les mineurs, l'entreprise de Mark Zuckerberg va analyser la structure osseuse des plus jeunes pour estimer leur âge.

item.title: ‘Eva Green is not vibing with her surroundings’ — can these smart sensors help me keep my houseplants alive?
item.description: Willow will let you know exactly what your houseplants need to grow strong and healthy — if you don't mind being bossed about by a fern.

item.title: I tested the LG C6 over two weeks — it's a notable upgrade over its predecessor, and sets the bar for mid-range OLED TVs in 2026
item.description: The LG C6 is a great upgrade over the already fantastic LG C5, and another blockbuster entry in the C-series OLED lineage.

item.title: ExpressVPN sharpens its desktop apps with faster controls and better accessibility — the updates are now live on Mac, Windows, and Linux
item.description: ExpressVPN's new 14.1.0 update for Windows, Mac, and Linux brings a minimized startup option, faster kill switch toggling, more reliable reconnections, and full keyboard and screen reader support.

item.title: Chrome on Android now supports approximate instead of precise location sharing
item.description: The new feature is a small win for Android users, as it gives them more control over how much location data they share with websites.

item.title: Google will now pay up to $1.5 million for finding Android and Chrome security bugs, says it has 'greatly appreciated collaborating with the researcher community'
item.description: Google is focusing on Linux kernel components, and prioritizing bugs that can't be easily found with AI.

item.title: Google updates AI search to include ‘expert advice’ from Reddit and other web forums
item.description: While citing web forums and discussion boards can help users find answers to more niche queries, this design choice could also prove chaotic.

item.title: Hackers Hate AI Slop Even More Than You Do
item.description: It's not just you. Scammers, hackers, and other cybercriminals are complaining about “AI shit” flooding platforms where they discuss cyberattacks and other illegal activity.

item.title: Khosla-backed robotics startup Genesis AI has gone full-stack, demo shows
item.description: Genesis AI, a startup that raised a $105 million seed round to build foundational AI for robotics, has unveiled its first model, GENE-26.5, but also a demo showcasing a set of robotic hands performing complex tasks.

item.title: Protection de la vie privée | OpenAI a manqué à ses obligations, selon des commissaires canadiens
item.description: Le géant américain de l’intelligence artificielle OpenAI a lancé ChatGPT « sans avoir pleinement pris en compte les risques connus en matière de protection de la vie privée » et n’était pas conforme à des lois canadiennes sur la protection des renseignements personnels.

item.title: Cette époustouflante enceinte de JBL notée 9/10 par nos soins profite d’une remise de 33 % chez Boulanger
item.description: Puissante, mobile grâce à ses roulettes et avec la possibilité de personnaliser son éclairage, la JBL PartyBox Ultimate s'affirme comme l'enceinte idéale pour toutes vos soirées. C'est le moment ou jamais de la découvrir puisqu'elle chute à 989,99 euros au lieu de 1 489 euros grâce à un code promo.

item.title: The Hoover HF3 DynamicClean is a feather-light budget cordless stick vacuum that gets the basics right
item.description: This lightweight cordless vacuum cleaner is reasonably priced, with great anti-wrap hair tech, but its battery life is relatively short.

item.title: Live updates from Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI
item.description: Sam Altman and Elon Musk are facing off in a high-stakes trial that could alter the future of OpenAI and its most well-known product, ChatGPT. In 2024, Musk filed a lawsuit accusing OpenAI of abandoning its founding mission of developing AI to benefit humanity and shifting focus to boosting profits instead. Elon Musk, his financial […]

item.title: Xbox changes continue with new console boot animation
item.description: It feels like not a day goes by at the moment without some Xbox news, and today is no different. Xbox CEO Asha Sharma just announced that Xbox owners will get a new boot up sound and animation on May 13th. The console boot animation is the new Xbox logo, complete with a slight twist […]

item.title: Here are the fitness trackers I actually recommend
item.description: Why do you want a fitness tracker? This is the first question I ask any time I’m asked to recommend a device. The number-one rule of wearable tech is that it has to be something you actually want to wear. So instead of molding yourself to a device, it’s better to pick something that isn’t […]

item.title: Tinder owner Match Group is slowing hiring to pay for its increased use of AI tools
item.description: Match Group said that it's slowing its hiring plans for the rest of the year because AI tools "cost a lot of money."

item.title: This driverless Chinese mining truck is giant, agile, and shows the industrial future of AI
item.description: It’s not just about humanoids. AI is coming for all of our machines. If you thought that embodied AI was all about humanoids and robotic good boys, allow me to introduce you to the Shuanglin K7. Equipped with a Level 4 driving brain that allows it to operate with no human intervention, this massive robot on four wheels can literally move on a dime, rotating 360 degrees on its own vertical axis and moving sideways like a crab, operating 24/7. ...

item.title: Chrome downloads a 4GB AI file without user consent, researcher alleges
item.description: There's no opt-in, and the file reappears if deleted.

item.title: Tesla : l’invention qui pourrait gonfler l’autonomie des voitures électriques en été
item.description: Tesla présente une idée innovante pour refroidir l’habitacle. Au lieu de combattre la chaleur par le froid, la marque californienne propose tout simplement de l’aspirer. Cela permettrait d’économiser la climatisation et d’améliorer l’autonomie.

item.title: Russia's censor body, Roskomnadzor, wants to block 92% of VPN apps by 2030 — and it's investing 20 billion rubles a year to build a permanent VPN censorship system
item.description: The Russian media regulator, Roskomnadzor, has set an ambitious and alarming goal: to block 92% of all Virtual Private Network (VPN) services operating within the country by 2030. Here's all we know.

item.title: Apple to pay $250M to settle lawsuit over Siri’s delayed AI features
item.description: Apple has agreed to pay $250 million to settle a class action lawsuit for overpromising the arrival of Siri's AI features.

item.title: Google is bringing Gemini to Mac in a bid to help organize your files and much more
item.description: The Gemini app for macOS could be getting new agentic powers to let it control your computer, just like Claude Cowork.

item.title: How to watch Mint from anywhere – it's *FREE*
item.description: Here's how to watch Mint online from anywhere in the world, completely FREE.

item.title: Valve publie les plans de la Steam Controller et lance la course aux accessoires
item.description: Épuisé en 30 minutes, revendu trois fois son prix sur eBay. En attendant le réapprovisionnement, Valve va armer les moddeurs.

item.title: The Litter-Robot 4 bundle is back down to its best price of the year
item.description: Scooping cat litter isn’t hard, but scooping after each and every litter box use can get annoying. The Litter-Robot 4 self-cleaning litter box is worth considering, not just because it’s one of the best-performing models, but because its accessory bundle is currently available for $799 ($60 off) at Amazon and Best Buy. The last time […]

item.title: Ethos raises $22.75M from a16z for its expert network with voice onboarding
item.description: Ethos says it is onboarding 35,000 experts per week.

item.title: Daredevil: Born Again season 3 will put a specific Marvel hero at the heart of its story — and answer a huge, longstanding question about them after their Netflix show's cancellation
item.description: Daredevil: Born Again's showrunner has also teased that their season 2 finale cameo is just the start of their MCU journey.

item.title: The app store for robots has arrived: Hugging Face launches open-source Reachy Mini App Store with 200+ apps
item.description: There's an app for nearly every imaginable user and use case these days, but one thing they all have in common is that they're centered around one device: the smartphone.That changes today as Hugging Face, the 10-year-old New York City startup best known for being the go-to place online to host and use cutting-edge, open-source AI models, agents and applications, launches a new App Store for Reachy Mini, its low-cost ($299) open-source physical robot that debuted back in July 2025 (itself the fruit of Hugging Face's acquisition of another startup, Pollen Robotics). The new Hugging Face Reachy ...

item.title: 80% of CEOs worry their job is at risk if AI fails this year, survey shows
item.description: A new survey of 900 CEOs reveal that they’re feeling the pressure from their boards to prove AI ROI, and that they worry about over-investing in the technology. A new survey of 900 CEOs around the world made one thing clear: company execs are feeling the heat when it comes to delivering on AI promises.

item.title: ‘Dignity-driven AI’? This chatbot advocates for domestic workers
item.description: A new AI chatbot created by and for domestic workers could empower nannies, cleaners, and home care workers to negotiate pay increases and workplace protections. Like many domestic workers, Leydy is no stranger to wage theft. In a previous job, Leydy had been hired as a cleaner and then asked to take on more and more responsibilities, from cooking to childcare—with no additional pay. When she approached her employer and said she either needed a raise or additional help, she was fired, and she never got paid for her work that week. ...

item.title: Add the Hisense 55-inch Canvas TV to your gallery wall for $350 less than usual
item.description: The Hisense 55-inch Canvas Art TV is on sale at Amazon for just $647.99, a savings of 35% and its second-best price ever.

item.title: The bonus gap is where pay inequality hides
item.description: Here’s how to fix it. Pay transparency is having a moment. Across Europe and beyond, new regulations are pushing organizations to disclose salary bands, justify pay differences, and confront longstanding inequities. It is a necessary shift and it’s long overdue. But there is a risk that, in focusing exclusively on base salary, companies miss a more elusive and equally consequential driver of inequality: the bonus gap....

item.title: « C’est discriminatoire » : le géant du fatbike attaque cette interdiction en justice
item.description: Alors que 96 % des fatbikes seraient illégaux en France, les Pays-Bas tentent de sévir. Mais à Enschede, l'interdiction basée sur la largeur des pneus provoque la fronde d'un importateur, bien décidé à faire plier la mairie en justice tout en contournant la règle.

item.title: Hurdle hints and answers for May 6, 2026
item.description: Hints and answers to today's Hurdle all in one place.

item.title: Aurora lands McLane deal to run driverless truck routes in Texas
item.description: Aurora said it plans to expand to new routes between McLane distribution centers across the U.S. Sun Belt by the end of 2026.

item.title: Upgrade your living room with the 55-inch Samsung M80H Mini LED TV for its lowest price yet
item.description: As of May 6, get the 55-inch Samsung M80H Mini LED TV for its lowest price yet.
